For a few years there has been many repairs and complaints about the power steering in the Jaguar F Pace. I was driving home Friday in the rain when out of nowhere the power steering quit working and I almost wrecked in a turn. I looked at the fluid which is full and check to see

narrative.headline: What 2018 Jaguar F-Pace owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 41 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Engine (39% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
